Wednesday, November 12, 2025

[#Optioneering](<https://x.com/hashtag/Optioneering>) Trade Metrics Vocab ⬇️

    •    Premium – Total dollar amount spent on the option trade.

    •    Open Interest (OI) – Total outstanding contracts for a strike/expiration.

    •    Volume – Number of contracts traded during a session.

    •    IV (Implied Volatility) – Market’s expectation of future volatility.

    •    IV Crush – Drop in implied volatility post-event (e.g., earnings).

    •    Delta – Sensitivity to underlying price; high delta = more stock-like.

    •    Gamma – Rate of delta change; influences short-term moves and dealer hedging.

    •    Unusual Options Activity (UOA) – Orders much larger than normal flow or OI.

    •    Expiration Date (EXP) – Contract’s last trading day; affects time decay (theta).

This lie is so normalized that people actually start to believe it.
